name: daily-ai-brief-cost-haiku-digest-sonnet-select-coordinator
description: Cost-optimization candidate #7 coordinator (Haiku): pure orchestration -- delegates research (Haiku, digest contract), selection (Sonnet, digest-only context), writing (Haiku, re-fetches selected sources), and listening-script (Haiku) in sequence, with a mechanical file-existence gate after every delegation, then cats the outputs. Writes no content itself. Content generation only; holds no AWS/delivery role. SEPARATE agent resource from the real live production agent and every other candidate.
